You haven't posted a challenge yet. Including this post.   Would I fit the bill?   Sure, but about what? What's your resolution?   For instance, you might say "Resolved: Creation and Evolution are equally valid interpretations of empirical evidence".   Now, personally I'd say that's still too vague because 'creation' drags in all kinds of issues that evolution doesn't speak to (eg abiogenesis, cosmology etc), and 'evolution' could mean common descent, the theory of evolution, etc etc.   So we might kick the idea around for a bit and narrow it down to "Resolved: Hypotheses of special creation of species and common descent are equally well supported by empirical evidence".   Or, perhaps it's the age of the earth you want to focus on: "Resolved: all available evidence is consistent with a 6-10,000 year old earth"   I can't do this for you, feindslayer; make up your mind and present a proper challenge.
